creator: rodperson@rodperson.com
text:
Added config option of installing EXIFTOOL which is required at runtime

Fix: 

9a10
> PORTREVISION=	1
31a33,38
> OPTIONS=	EXIFTOOL "Use perl Exif Tool" on
> 
> .if !defined (WITHOUT_EXIFTOOL)
>     LIB_DEPENDS += sndfile.1"${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool
> .endif
>
